# EcomSol Store - Handcrafted Cosplay Accessories

> EcomSol Store (ecomsol.store) sells original handcrafted cosplay accessories including animal ears, tails, and matched sets. All products feature premium faux fur, are 100% cruelty-free, and are designed for convention/cosplay use.

## Products

### Cat Ears
- Brown Faux Fur Cat Ears Headband - $30.00 - Realistic dark brown with cream tufts and pink inner ear
- White Cat Ears with Blue Organza Ribbons - $35.00 - Fairy lolita style with purple flowers
- Grey and Deep Rose Poseable Bunny Rabbit Ears Headband - $40.00 - Fully poseable with wire core

### Ears & Tail Sets
- White Curly Plush Cat Ears and Tail Set - $32.00 - Kawaii style with unique curly texture
- Black Faux Fur Cat Ears and Tail Set - $38.00 - Realistic black cat with cream tufts
- Neon Green and Black Cat Ears and Tail Set - From $25.00 - Electric rave style, ears/tail/set options
- Red Fox Ears and Tail Set - From $28.00 - Realistic red fox, ears/tail/set options

## Key Facts
- All products are original designs
- Materials: Premium faux fur, metal headbands, flexible wire cores, belt straps
- Price range: $25-$50
- Ships worldwide within 3-5 business days
- All purchases through Etsy shop (etsy.com/shop/ecomsolstore)
- 100% cruelty-free synthetic materials

## Site Structure
- Homepage: /
- All Products: /shop
- Product Pages: /shop/[product-slug]
- Categories: /category/ears, /category/tails, /category/sets
- About: /about
- FAQ: /faq

## Contact
- Etsy Shop: https://www.etsy.com/shop/ecomsolstore
